overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a space exploration game showing an astronaut walking across a barren rocky alien desert, transitioning to a fighter spacecraft flying in orbit above the planet. The visual style features desaturated earth tones and cinematic lighting typical of modern game engines like Star Citizen.

events.description: screen fades to black, transitioning from planetary surface to orbital space view

agents.ego_description: astronaut in armored spacesuit walking steadily across rocky terrain, navigating between dark volcanic boulders

entered.detail: uneven gray-brown rocky ground with scattered stones and cracks covering the walking surface
massive dark rock formations rising from the ground on the right side of the path
hazy silhouettes of low mountains visible on the horizon under the pale sky
smaller rock piles and boulders scattered across the left side of the landscape

segments.scene_description: An astronaut explores a desolate rocky desert landscape under a hazy pale sky. The camera follows from behind as the character walks steadily across uneven gravel terrain, passing large dark boulders on the right with distant mountains visible on the horizon. The environment is completely barren with no vegetation or other life.

events.description: cut to exterior view of fighter spacecraft flying in orbit above the planet surface

agents.ego_description: piloting a gray single-seat fighter spacecraft in stable orbit above the desert planet

entered.detail: curved planetary surface showing the same rocky desert terrain from orbit, partially obscured by atmospheric haze
thin blue-gray atmospheric glow along the curve of the planet where light scatters
dense field of stars visible against the blackness of space on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to orbital space where a sleek gray fighter spacecraft flies above the planet. The curved desert surface is visible below with a thin atmospheric haze along the horizon, while stars fill the black space background. The ship maintains a steady cruising trajectory in the planet's orbit.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a desolate alien surface into the silent expanse of orbital space. It begins behind an astronaut walking steadily across a barren, rocky desert of uneven gravel and dark boulders under a hazy pale sky. As the perspective pulls away from the desolate terrain and distant mountains, the scene shifts upward, piercing through the thin atmospheric haze along the horizon. The view then expands to reveal the curved surface of the planet below, transitioning into the black void of space where stars fill the background. Finally, the camera settles on a sleek gray fighter spacecraft maintaining a steady cruising trajectory in orbit.
